subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the 5th of Dhi'l-Hajjih 1339 was received, wherein thou hadst written that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما که بتاریخ ۵ ذی حجه ۳۹ بود رسید مرقوم نموده بودید که
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
